what: Build initial knowledge index for the new local vault
why: Makes vault content searchable immediately after registration; non-fatal so a fresh empty vault still registers successfully

error_handling.criteria: Any error from the knowledge-index-build sub-flow
error_handling.action: Log warning, return entry_count=0, do NOT fail registration

decisions.reason: Non-fatal: a fresh vault has no markdown files so empty index is expected
decisions.rationale: Registration should always succeed even if indexing fails
